commands: docker run -d --name agones-palworld-e2e -p 8211:8211/udp -p 8212:8212/tcp -p 25575:25575/tcp -e PUID=1000 -e PGID=1000 -e SERVER_NAME=e2e -e ADMIN_PASSWORD=e2e-admin -e SERVER_PASSWORD=e2e-secret -e MAX_PLAYERS=4 -e RCON_ENABLED=true -e RCON_PORT=25575 -e RESTAPI_ENABLED=true -e RESTAPI_PORT=8212 -e MULTITHREAD_ENABLED=true -e COMMUNITY_SERVER=false -e BACKUP_ENABLED=false -e RESTART_ENABLED=false -e PLAYER_DETECTION_ENABLED=false -e RCON_PLAYER_DETECTION=false -e WORKSHOP_MOD_UPDATE_CRON='0 4 1 1 *' kbve/agones-palworld:latest

echo 'CI gate: container up + UE4SS + PalChatRelay load (<=300s). Full game boot + REST + chat are validated in-cluster (16-32Gi) — a GitHub runner cannot drive a Windows-Palworld-under-Wine boot.' && for i in $(seq 1 300); do if [ -z "$(docker ps -q -f name=agones-palworld-e2e -f status=running)" ]; then echo "Container exited early at ${i}s — dumping logs:"; docker logs agones-palworld-e2e 2>&1 | tail -120; docker rm -f agones-palworld-e2e 2>/dev/null || true; exit 1; fi; f=$(docker exec agones-palworld-e2e bash -lc 'find /palworld/Pal/Binaries/Win64/ue4ss -iname UE4SS.log 2>/dev/null | head -1' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$f" ] && docker exec agones-palworld-e2e bash -lc "grep -q 'PalChatRelay] loaded' '$f'" 2>/dev/null; then echo "PASS: UE4SS + PalChatRelay loaded (log: $f)"; docker exec agones-palworld-e2e bash -lc "grep -i PalChatRelay '$f'" 2>/dev/null | sed 's/^/  | /'; break; fi; if [ $(( i % 20 )) -eq 0 ]; then echo "--- [${i}s] waiting for UE4SS/PalChatRelay load ---"; [ -n "$f" ] && docker exec agones-palworld-e2e bash -lc "tail -3 '$f'" 2>/dev/null | sed 's/^/  | /'; fi; if [ $i -eq 300 ]; then echo 'FAIL: UE4SS/PalChatRelay did not load in 300s — diagnostics:'; docker exec agones-palworld-e2e bash -lc 'echo "[Mods]"; ls -la /palworld/Pal/Binaries/Win64/ue4ss/Mods 2>/dev/null; echo "[mods.txt]"; cat /palworld/Pal/Binaries/Win64/ue4ss/Mods/mods.txt 2>/dev/null; echo "[UE4SS.log]"; find /palworld/Pal/Binaries/Win64/ue4ss -iname UE4SS.log -exec tail -n 60 {} + 2>/dev/null' 2>&1 | sed 's/^/  | /' || true; docker rm -f agones-palworld-e2e 2>/dev/null || true; exit 1; fi; sleep 1; done

echo 'Best-effort REST probe (<=180s; non-fatal — full game boot is a cluster-resource test)...' && REST_UP=0; for i in $(seq 1 180); do if curl -fsS -u admin:e2e-admin http://127.0.0.1:8212/v1/api/info >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "REST up after ${i}s"; REST_UP=1; break; fi; if [ -z "$(docker ps -q -f name=agones-palworld-e2e -f status=running)" ]; then echo 'container stopped during REST probe'; break; fi; sleep 1; done; EC=0; if [ "$REST_UP" = "1" ]; then echo 'REST is up — running vitest...'; PALWORLD_HOST=127.0.0.1 PALWORLD_REST=8212 PALWORLD_ADMIN_PASSWORD=e2e-admin npx vitest run; EC=$?; else echo '::warning::REST API did not come up within 180s on the CI runner; full Windows-Palworld-under-Wine boot is validated in-cluster. Image + UE4SS + PalChatRelay load already verified above.'; fi; echo '--- container logs tail ---'; docker logs agones-palworld-e2e 2>&1 | tail -60; docker rm -f agones-palworld-e2e 2>/dev/null || true; exit $EC
